channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Pentagon policy illegally banned transgender troops from military service, appeals court panel rules
item.description: A divided panel of appeals court judges has ruled that a Trump administration policy illegally banned transgender troops from military service.

item.title: Colorado elections clerk released from prison after governor commutes sentence
A key hearing for the man accused of killing Charlie Kirk will be public, judge rules
